author: taulepton_
content: Yes, I agree that PR's relating to this should be closed for the time being. Whilst I think it is reasonable that we would want this feature for testing, etc, it is likely to create pushback and controversy and make the EIP process a little more difficult. I still believe this feature should be implemented for testing the stack without an EL, but I don't think the system is mature enough for us to bake this into the specification and define this as a protocol feature.

author: taulepton_
content: I've also closed my PR here - https://github.com/ethereum/consensus-specs/pull/5161. I will save the context from both of these PRs because I think this will be useful in the future when we push this feature into the core protocol.
